zh.lifeSummary: 當Honor Grenville於大約1490年出生在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Grenville II39歲，母親Isabella Gilbert36歲。她於1511年與Sir John Bassett在英國英格蘭可瓦爾特希迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年4月在英國可瓦爾特希迪享年77歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾易洛甘。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honor Grenville于大约1490年出生在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Grenville II39岁，母亲Isabella Gilbert36岁。她于1511年与Sir John Bassett在英国英格兰可瓦爾特希迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年4月在英国可瓦爾特希迪享年77岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾易洛甘。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Honor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Honour ;  the dominant spelling of both the vocabulary word and the given name in the United States today. This is now the more frequent spelling of the name in Britain also, used, for example, for the actress  Honor Blackman  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Honour
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality (via Old French, from Latin honor). The name was popular with the Puritans in the 17th century and has remained in modest use to the present day.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Honor Grenville was born about 1490, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Thomas Grenville II, was 39 and her mother, Isabella Gilbert, was 36. She married Sir John Bassett in 1511, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in April 1566, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Illogan, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honor Grenville est née environ 1490, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Grenville II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabella Gilbert, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bassett en 1511, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1566, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Illogan, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Honor Grenville um 1490 in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Grenville II 39 und ihre Mutter Isabella Gilbert 36. Sie hat 1511 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir John Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1566 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Tehidy, Cornwall, England und wurde in Illogan, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Grenville è nata il circa 1490 nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Grenville II, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabella Gilbert, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Bassett nel 1511, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1566, nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Illogan, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Honor Grenvilleが約1490年にイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Grenville IIは39歳，母Isabella Gilbertは36歳であった。1511年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルテヒディでSir John Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年4月にイギリスコルンワルテヒディで77歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルイロガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Honor Grenville(이)가 대략 1490년 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grenville II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Gilbert(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 테히디에서 Sir John Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 4월 영국 코른월 테히디에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 이로건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Grenville nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grenville II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Gilbert, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bassett em 1511, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1566, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Illogan, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honor Grenville родилась около 1490 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grenville II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Gilbert, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bassett в 1511 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла апрель 1566 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности иллоган, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Honor Grenville nació aproximadamente 1490, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Grenville II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabella Gilbert, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir John Bassett en 1511, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en abril de 1566, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Illogan, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
